mapper.select: select id, order_no, customer_name, sender_address, receiver_address, cargo_name, cargo_weight, status, created_at, updated_at from logistics_order order by id desc limit #{limit}
select id, order_no, customer_name, sender_address, receiver_address, cargo_name, cargo_weight, status, created_at, updated_at from logistics_order where order_no = #{orderNo}
